scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && node scripts/python-env.mjs setup
scripts.setup:sam3:cuda: node scripts/python-env.mjs pip install --upgrade --force-reinstall torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu126
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,orchestrator,ragvlm,video,sam3 -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "node scripts/python-env.mjs service services/orchestrator 8000" "node scripts/python-env.mjs service services/ragvlm-service 8001" "node scripts/python-env.mjs service services/video-service 8002" "node scripts/python-env.mjs service services/sam3-service 8003"
